calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (per Ex parte order filed 1/30/2026).

The Order to Show Cause is OFF CALENDAR.

The parties' stipulation, executed February 18, 2026, is before the court. The court will sign the related order and execute the Proposed Order prepared on Judicial Council Form CIV-165. In light of these facts, the court orders the hearing on the OSC off calendar.

Prior to the hearing, Petitioner shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

The Court signs a stipulation, an order on unlawful use of personal identifying information and order granting petitioner the Foggy Dog LLc's Petition for an Order on Unlawful use of personal identifying information (CIV-165)(see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
